title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology presents an overview of AI pair programming and its applications in software development. The video covers how AI tools assist developers in debugging, code review, and improving productivity through AI-assisted coding practices.
writeup: IBM Technology's video explains AI pair programming, the practice of using AI coding tools as a collaborator during software development. It covers how these tools support developers in debugging, code review, and code generation, with the aim of improving productivity through AI-assisted coding. The takeaway is a framing of AI as an assistant integrated into routine development tasks rather than a standalone replacement.
